description: MCP access to AWS APIs for cloud resource operations and automation workflows.
name: io.qent.broxy/aws-api

environmentVariables.description: Default AWS region for CLI commands unless a specific region is provided in the request
environmentVariables.name: AWS_REGION

environmentVariables.description: AWS access key ID for authentication
environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: AWS secret access key for authentication
environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: AWS session token for temporary credentials
environmentVariables.name: AWS_SESSION_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: When set to "true", restricts execution to read-only operations
environmentVariables.name: READ_OPERATIONS_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: When set to "true", asks explicit consent before executing non-read-only operations
environmentVariables.name: REQUIRE_MUTATION_CONSENT

environmentVariables.description: Working directory path for MCP server operations (must be absolute path)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_API_MCP_WORKING_DIR

environmentVariables.description: When set to "true", enables system-wide file access (may cause unintended overwrites)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_API_MCP_ALLOW_UNRESTRICTED_LOCAL_FILE_ACCESS

environmentVariables.description: Allow sending additional telemetry data to AWS related to server configuration
environmentVariables.name: AWS_API_MCP_TELEMETRY

environmentVariables.description: When set to "true", enables experimental agent scripts functionality
environmentVariables.name: EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_SCRIPTS

environmentVariables.description: Directory path containing custom user scripts for agent scripts functionality
environmentVariables.name: AWS_API_MCP_AGENT_SCRIPTS_DIR

title: AWS API
